content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "看醫生掛號",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "你好，我想要掛號。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào guàhào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 gua4hao4.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to register.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 접수하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃台人員",
          "text": "好的，請問你哪裡不舒服？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nǐ nǎlǐ bù shūfu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3wen4 ni3 na3li3 bu4 shu1fu?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, may I ask what's bothering you?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 어디가 불편하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "我昨天開始發燒，還有咳嗽和頭痛。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ fāshāo, hái yǒu késòu hé tóutòng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 fa1shao1, hai2 you3 ke2sou4 he2 tou2tong4.",
          "translation_en": "I started having a fever yesterday, plus a cough and headache.",
          "translation_ko": "어제부터 열이 나고, 기침과 두통도 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃台人員",
          "text": "我幫你安排看醫生，請等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bāng nǐ ānpái kàn yīshēng, qǐng děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bang1 ni3 an1pai2 kan4 yi1sheng1, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "I'll arrange for you to see the doctor, please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "의사 선생님 진료를 예약해 드릴게요, 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "謝謝。大概要等多久？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Dàgài yào děng duōjiǔ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5. Da4gai4 yao4 deng3 duo1jiu3?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. About how long do I need to wait?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 얼마나 기다려야 하나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃台人員",
          "text": "大概二十分鐘。這是你的掛號單，請拿好。",
          "pinyin": "Dàgài èrshí fēnzhōng. Zhè shì nǐ de guàhào dān, qǐng ná hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Da4gai4 er4shi2 fen1zhong1. Zhe4 shi4 ni3 de gua4hao4 dan1, qing3 na2 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "About twenty minutes. Here's your registration form, please hold onto it.",
          "translation_ko": "약 20분입니다. 접수증입니다, 잘 챙기세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "好的，沒問題。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, méi wèntí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, mei2 wen4ti2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, no problem.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What symptoms does the patient have?",
          "question_ko": "환자는 어떤 증상이 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Fever, cough, and headache", "Stomachache and fever", "Cough only"],
          "options_ko": ["열, 기침, 두통", "복통과 열", "기침만"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are at a clinic. Tell the receptionist your symptoms and ask how long you need to wait."
    },
    {
      "title": "修理漏水",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "房客",
          "text": "房東，我房間的水龍頭壞掉了，一直在漏水。",
          "pinyin": "Fángdōng, wǒ fángjiān de shuǐlóngtóu huài diào le, yīzhí zài lòushuǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Fang2dong1, wo3 fang2jian1 de shui3long2tou2 huai4 diao4 le, yi1zhi2 zai4 lou4shui3.",
          "translation_en": "Landlord, the faucet in my room is broken and keeps leaking.",
          "translation_ko": "집주인님, 제 방 수도꼭지가 고장 나서 계속 물이 새고 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "不好意思，我馬上安排師傅過去檢查。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ mǎshàng ānpái shīfu guòqù jiǎnchá.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si5, wo3 ma3shang4 an1pai2 shi1fu4 guo4qu4 jian3cha2.",
          "translation_en": "I'm sorry, I'll arrange for a repairman to come check it right away.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 바로 기사님을 보내서 확인하도록 하겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房客",
          "text": "謝謝。請問師傅什麼時候會來？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Qǐngwèn shīfu shénme shíhou huì lái?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5. Qing3wen4 shi1fu4 shen2me shi2hou5 hui4 lai2?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. When will the repairman come?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 기사님은 언제 오시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "我幫你預約今天下午三點，可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bāng nǐ yùyuē jīntiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn, kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bang1 ni3 yu4yue1 jin1tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3, ke3yi3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I'll make an appointment for today at 3 PM, is that okay?",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 오후 3시로 예약해 드릴게요, 괜찮으신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房客",
          "text": "可以，沒問題。",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, méi wèntí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3, mei2 wen4ti2.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, no problem.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 괜찮습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "好的，我確認好再跟你說。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ quèrèn hǎo zài gēn nǐ shuō.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 que4ren4 hao3 zai4 gen1 ni3 shuo1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll confirm and let you know.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 확인 후에 다시 알려드리겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is the problem in the room?",
          "question_ko": "방에 무슨 문제가 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The faucet is leaking", "The light is broken", "The door is stuck"],
          "options_ko": ["수도꼭지가 샌다", "전등이 고장 났다", "문이 걸렸다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a tenant. Tell your landlord that the faucet is broken and ask when the repairman can come."
    },
    {
      "title": "藥局拿藥",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "你好，我剛剛看完醫生，這是藥單。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ gānggāng kàn wán yīshēng, zhè shì yào dān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 gang1gang1 kan4 wan2 yi1sheng1, zhe4 shi4 yao4 dan1.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I just saw the doctor. Here's the prescription.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 방금 진료를 받고 왔습니다. 처방전입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "好的，請等一下，我幫你準備藥。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng děng yīxià, wǒ bāng nǐ zhǔnbèi yào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4, wo3 bang1 ni3 zhun3bei4 yao4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please wait a moment, I'll prepare your medicine.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 잠시만 기다려 주세요, 약을 준비해 드리겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "謝謝。請問這個藥怎麼吃？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Qǐngwèn zhège yào zěnme chī?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5. Qing3wen4 zhe4ge5 yao4 zen3me chi1?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. How should I take this medicine?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 이 약은 어떻게 먹나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "這個藥一天三次，飯後吃。一次吃一包。",
          "pinyin": "Zhège yào yī tiān sān cì, fàn hòu chī. Yī cì chī yī bāo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge5 yao4 yi1 tian1 san1 ci4, fan4 hou4 chi1. Yi1 ci4 chi1 yi1 bao1.",
          "translation_en": "Take this medicine three times a day, after meals. One packet each time.",
          "translation_ko": "이 약은 하루 세 번, 식후에 드세요. 한 번에 한 봉지씩 드시면 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "好的，我了解了。謝謝你。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ liǎojiě le. Xièxie nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 liao3jie3 le. Xie4xie5 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다. 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "不客氣，祝你早日康復。",
          "pinyin": "Bú kèqì, zhù nǐ zǎorì kāngfù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 ke4qi4, zhu4 ni3 zao3ri4 kang1fu4.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome, I wish you a speedy recovery.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요, 빨리 쾌차하시길 바랍니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How should the patient take the medicine?",
          "question_ko": "환자는 약을 어떻게 먹어야 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Once a day, before meals", "Three times a day, after meals", "Twice a day, with meals"],
          "options_ko": ["하루 한 번, 식전", "하루 세 번, 식후", "하루 두 번, 식사와 함께"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are at a pharmacy. Show the prescription and ask how to take the medicine."
    }
  ]
}
